compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_link (thin-wrapper) in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Implement
Add ticket_link to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher link case.

## Scope (thin-wrapper — ticket-link.sh is 469 lines; link routes via ticket-graph.py for cycle detection)
ticket_link <id1> <id2> <relation>:
- Parse args; validate relation is one of: blocks|depends_on|relates_to
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-link.sh link "$@"; return $?
- Thin wrapper: call python3 $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-graph.py --link "$@" (one python3 call — cycle detection is intrinsically Python)
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths
- Target: <0.15s (one python3 call is the floor)

Dispatcher change: replace exec python3 .../ticket-graph.py --link with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_link "$@"
Note: current dispatcher routes link via ticket-graph.py directly; wrapper preserves this.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket_link defined in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_link" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] ticket_link calls ticket-graph.py for cycle detection (exactly one python3 call on default path)
  Verify: grep -A10 "^ticket_link" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "ticket-graph.py"
- [ ] test_ticket_link_via_library passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*link"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
